items.name: Bone Charm
items.description: A crude trinket carved from the femur of a fallen pit fighter. The marrow still hums with residual agony, lending its wearer a sliver of the dead man's tenacity.

items.name: Rat Skull Pendant
items.description: Strung on a frayed cord of gut, this tiny skull was taken from the sewers beneath the arena. Gladiators who wear it claim the vermin spirits ward off infection and cowardice alike.

items.name: Slave Brand Token
items.description: A flat disc of scorched bronze bearing the mark of a defunct ludus. Former slaves press it to their scars before each bout, drawing strength from the memory of chains broken.

items.name: Ashen Finger Bone
items.description: Pulled from the pyre of a disgraced champion, the finger bone is wrapped in copper wire. It grows warm in the presence of treachery, a grim compass for the paranoid.

items.name: Gutter Coin
items.description: A defaced aureus stamped with the likeness of a forgotten emperor. Arena beggars swear that carrying one brings luck, though its previous owners all died in the sand.

items.name: Dried Blood Vial
items.description: A sealed clay vial containing flakes of blackened blood harvested from the arena floor after a legendary massacre. The crust occasionally shifts on its own when battle is near.

items.name: Iron Ring
items.description: A heavy band forged from melted manacles. It sits tight on the finger, a constant reminder that freedom in the arena is only ever one fight away from being revoked.

items.name: Scorpion Brooch
items.description: Cast in dark bronze and inlaid with a chip of obsidian, this brooch depicts a desert scorpion mid-strike. Its barbed clasp draws a drop of blood each time it is fastened.

items.name: Vulture's Eye Bead
items.description: A polished sphere of smoky quartz said to be plucked from a vulture that fed exclusively on arena corpses. Those who gaze through it claim to see the weak points in any stance.

items.name: Gladiator's Tooth
items.description: A molar capped in tin, knocked from the jaw of a champion by an underdog's desperate headbutt. Carrying it is considered both a trophy and a warning against overconfidence.

items.name: Tar Knuckle Wrap
items.description: Strips of linen soaked in boiling tar and wound tight around the fist. Once dried, the wrapping is hard as stone and reeks of smoke, turning bare hands into brutal weapons.

items.name: Centurion's Clasp
items.description: A tarnished silver cloak pin stolen from a legionary's corpse during a border skirmish. The eagle motif is scratched away, replaced with crude arena runes for endurance.

items.name: Blood Pendant
items.description: A teardrop of crystallized blood encased in blackened silver. It pulses faintly against the chest, synchronizing with the wearer's heartbeat and quickening it before the kill.

items.name: Shadow Anklet
items.description: A chain of dark iron links that emits no sound when the wearer moves. Assassins and retiarii favor it for the unnatural silence it grants, as if the shadows themselves muffle each step.

items.name: Wrath Shard Earring
items.description: A jagged splinter of crimson gemstone pierced through the earlobe. When the wearer's blood is spilled, the shard glows and feeds rage directly into the nervous system.

items.name: Tomb Spider Brooch
items.description: An eight-legged pin carved from petrified wood found in a catacomb beneath the Colosseum. Fine silk threads trail from its abdomen, stitching minor wounds shut on contact.

items.name: Cursed Laurel Pin
items.description: A miniature laurel wreath cast in lead, awarded to a champion who slaughtered his own lanista. It corrodes any metal it touches but grants unnatural resilience to its bearer.

items.name: Gore-Stained Locket
items.description: Inside this dented bronze locket lies a painted portrait bleached beyond recognition. The gore that stains its surface never fully dries, and the metal is always warm to the touch.

items.name: Void Amulet
items.description: A disc of absolute blackness framed in cracked bone. Looking into it reveals nothing, not even one's own reflection. Those who wear it report the sensation of being watched from within.

items.name: Infernal Knot
items.description: A tangled mass of iron wire that writhes slowly when heated by body warmth. Scholars believe it was pulled from the ribcage of a daemon during the fall of an ancient city.

items.name: Bloodsworn Choker
items.description: A collar of interlocking vertebrae taken from a sea serpent. It tightens slightly during combat, restricting breath just enough to trigger a berserker's survival instinct.

items.name: Eye of Malice
items.description: A petrified eyeball set in a cage of thorns, perpetually weeping a thin black fluid. Gladiators who meet its gaze feel their hatred sharpen into something almost divine.

items.name: Reaper's Bangle
items.description: A wrist cuff forged from the scythe of a death cultist. Thin as parchment yet impossible to break, it hums a low dirge audible only to the dying.

items.name: Obsidian Heart Stud
items.description: A polished bead of volcanic glass worn over the sternum. It absorbs the shock of blows meant to stop the heart, shattering and reforming between fights like a dark miracle.

items.name: Crown of Ash
items.description: A circlet of fused cinder and bone that never cools. It was recovered from the eruption that buried a rival arena, and the screams of the entombed can still be heard on quiet nights.

items.name: Chain of the Unbroken
items.description: Forty links of meteoric iron, each inscribed with the name of a gladiator who retired free. The chain grows heavier with each victory, as if the names themselves carry weight.

items.name: Dread Emperor's Sigil
items.description: An imperial seal thought destroyed when the tyrant's palace burned. Its surface shifts between gold and black depending on the viewer's allegiance, and it commands obedience from lesser beasts.

items.name: Marrow of the Titan
items.description: A finger-length shard of crystallized bone marrow extracted from a giant's remains beneath the forum. It radiates an oppressive warmth and causes the bearer's veins to glow faintly in darkness.

items.name: Stygian Loop
items.description: A ring of black water that defies gravity, hovering around the wearer's wrist. It was drawn from the river that borders the land of the dead, and it chills everything it touches to the bone.

items.name: Sanguine Star
items.description: A six-pointed star forged from blood-iron, a metal smelted only during lunar eclipses. Each point represents a mortal sin, and the star drinks deeply from any wound it touches.
